About the Instructor

Dr. Abdelrahman Elrashidy

ICU Clinical Pharmacist

Welcome to Clinical Round — your dedicated platform for critical care pharmacy board exam preparation. These board-style questions are curated from the ACCP/ASHP 2025 Critical Care Pharmacy Preparatory Review and Recertification Course to help you master high-yield clinical concepts.

Each question comes with detailed explanations covering why each option is correct or incorrect, helping you build deep clinical reasoning skills essential for the ICU.
